message:
feat: Improve test_buffer.py codegen - reduce errors from 140+ to 58

- Add _testbuffer functions: slice_indices, get_pointer, get_contiguous,
  py_buffer_to_contiguous, cmp_contig
- Fix slice() builtin to use arguments instead of hardcoded nulls
- Add isNameUsedInBodyExcludingYield for generator param handling
- Fix array.array inline methods (byteswap, frombytes, itemsize)
- Add numpy_array null placeholder for unavailable numpy import
- Fix generator function param unused warnings

files.patch:
@@ -1,126 +1,114 @@
-.PHONY: help benchmark benchmark-train benchmark-encoding benchmark-web benchmark-json benchmark-quick test-correctness build build-wasm clean
+.PHONY: help benchmark benchmark-train benchmark-encoding benchmark-web test-correctness build build-metal0 build-wasm clean
 
 # Colors for output
 GREEN := \033[0;32m
 YELLOW := \033[0;33m
 BLUE := \033[0;34m
 RESET := \033[0m
 
-# Build flags
-ZIG := zig
-OPTIMIZE := -O ReleaseFast
-BIN_DIR := zig-out/bin
+# Paths
+METAL0 := ../../zig-out/bin/metal0
+BIN_DIR := bin
 
 # Default target - show help
 help:
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)metal0 Tokenizer Benchmarks$(RESET)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)metal0 Tokenizer Benchmarks (Python → Binary)$(RESET)"
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
-	@echo "$(GREEN)Available targets:$(RESET)"
-	@echo "  make benchmark-quick    - ⚡ Quick (3 libs, 100 iter, ~5s) - for rapid iteration"
-	@echo "  make benchmark          - Run ALL benchmarks (train + encoding + web + json)"
-	@echo "  make benchmark-train    - BPE training (3 libraries)"
-	@echo "  make benchmark-encoding - Encoding (5 libraries w/ metal0, TokenDagger)"
-	@echo "  make benchmark-web      - Web/WASM benchmark (4 libraries)"
-	@echo "  make benchmark-json     - JSON parse+stringify (Zig vs Rust vs Python vs Go)"
-	@echo "  make test-correctness   - Verify metal0 matches tiktoken (583+ tests)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)Flow: Python code → metal0 compiler → Native binary$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
-	@echo "$(GREEN)Build targets:$(RESET)"
-	@echo "  make build              - Build all native binaries"
-	@echo "  make build-wasm         - Build WASM tokenizer"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)Available targets:$(RESET)"
+	@echo "  make build-metal0       - Compile Python tokenizer with metal0"
+	@echo "  make test-correctness   - Verify metal0 output matches tiktoken"
+	@echo "  make benchmark-encoding - Benchmark encoding (metal0 vs others)"
+	@echo "  make benchmark-train    - BPE training benchmark"
+	@echo "  make benchmark-web      - Web/WASM benchmark"
+	@echo "  make benchmark          - Run ALL benchmarks"
 	@echo "  make clean              - Clean build artifacts"
 	@echo ""
 
-# Run all benchmarks (train + encoding + web + json)
-benchmark: benchmark-train benchmark-encoding benchmark-web benchmark-json
-
-# Training benchmarks (metal0 vs HuggingFace vs SentencePiece)
-benchmark-train:
+# Build metal0 tokenizer binaries from Python source
+build-metal0:
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)📊 BPE Training Benchmark (hyperfine)$(RESET)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)🔨 Compiling Python → Native with metal0$(RESET)"
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo ""
-	@./bench_training.sh
+	@mkdir -p $(BIN_DIR)
+	@echo "$(YELLOW)Compiling accuracy_test_metal0.py...$(RESET)"
+	$(METAL0) accuracy_test_metal0.py -o $(BIN_DIR)/accuracy_test --force
+	@echo "$(YELLOW)Compiling bench_full_metal0.py...$(RESET)"
+	$(METAL0) bench_full_metal0.py -o $(BIN_DIR)/bench_encoding --force
+	@echo "$(GREEN)✅ Build complete$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
 
-# Quick benchmark (metal0 vs Rust JSON stringify - for fast iteration)
-benchmark-quick:
+# Test correctness: Python → metal0 → binary, compare with tiktoken
+test-correctness: build-metal0
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)⚡ Quick Benchmark: metal0 vs Rust JSON Stringify$(RESET)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)🔍 Encoding Correctness Test (metal0 Python flow)$(RESET)"
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
-	@./bench_hyperfine.sh
+	@echo "Flow: accuracy_test_metal0.py → metal0 → bin/accuracy_test"
+	@echo "Compare: metal0 output vs tiktoken (Python)"
+	@echo ""
+	@python3 test_correctness_metal0.py
 	@echo ""
 
-# Native encoding benchmarks (5 libraries: metal0, rs-bpe, tiktoken, TokenDagger, HuggingFace)
-benchmark-encoding:
+# Encoding benchmark: Python → metal0 → binary
+benchmark-encoding: build-metal0
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)🚀 Encoding Benchmark: 5 libraries$(RESET)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)🚀 Encoding Benchmark (metal0 Python flow)$(RESET)"
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
-	@./BENCHMARK.sh
+	@echo "Flow: bench_full_metal0.py → metal0 → bin/bench_encoding"
+	@echo ""
+	@./$(BIN_DIR)/bench_encoding
 	@echo ""
 
-# Test correctness (comprehensive: 601 texts - 592 benchmark + 9 edge cases)
-test-correctness:
+# Training benchmarks (uses Zig trainer - training is Zig-native)
+benchmark-train:
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)🔍 Encoding Correctness Test (601 cases)$(RESET)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)📊 BPE Training Benchmark$(RESET)"
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
-	@python3 test_encoding_full.py
+	@echo "Note: Training uses Zig-native implementation (not Python)"
+	@./bench_training.sh
 	@echo ""
 
-# Web/WASM benchmarks (hyperfine-based, Node.js)
+# Web/WASM benchmark
 benchmark-web: build-wasm
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)🌐 Web/WASM Benchmark (hyperfine)$(RESET)"
+	@echo "$(GREEN)🌐 Web/WASM Benchmark$(RESET)"
 	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
 	@chmod +x bench_web.sh
 	@./bench_web.sh
 	@echo ""
 
-# JSON parse+stringify benchmarks
-benchmark-json:
-	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(GREEN)📊 JSON Parse+Stringify Benchmark (hyperfine)$(RESET)"
-	@echo "$(BLUE)━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━$(RESET)"
-	@echo ""
-	@chmod +x bench_json.sh
-	@./bench_json.sh
-	@echo ""
-
-# Build all native binaries (using zig build system)
-build:
-	@echo "$(YELLOW)🔨 Building native binaries...$(RESET)"
-	@mkdir -p $(BIN_DIR)
-	@$(ZIG) build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
-	@echo "$(GREEN)✅ Build complete$(RESET)"
-	@echo ""
-
-# Build WASM tokenizer (direct zig command)
+# Build WASM (TODO: Python → metal0 → WASM)
 build-wasm:
 	@echo "$(YELLOW)🔨 Building WASM tokenizer...$(RESET)"
 	@mkdir -p dist
-	@$(ZIG) build-exe src/wasm.zig \
+	@zig build-exe src/wasm.zig \
 		-target wasm32-freestanding \
 		-fno-entry \
 		-O ReleaseSmall \
 		-rdynamic \
 		-femit-bin=dist/metal0_tokenizer.wasm
-	@if [ ! -f dist/cl100k_simple.json ]; then \
-		echo "$(YELLOW)⚠️  cl100k_simple.json not found in dist/$(RESET)"; \
-		echo "$(YELLOW)   Copy vocab file: cp vocab/cl100k_simple.json dist/$(RESET)"; \
-		exit 1; \
-	fi
 	@echo "$(GREEN)✅ WASM build complete$(RESET)"
 	@echo ""
 
-# Clean build artifacts
+# Run all benchmarks
+benchmark: benchmark-encoding benchmark-train benchmark-web
+
+# Legacy build (Zig-native, not Python flow)
+build:
+	@echo "$(YELLOW)🔨 Building Zig-native binaries...$(RESET)"
+	@mkdir -p zig-out/bin
+	@zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+	@echo "$(GREEN)✅ Build complete$(RESET)"
+
+# Clean
 clean:
-	@echo "$(YELLOW)🧹 Cleaning build artifacts...$(RESET)"
-	@rm -rf zig-out/ zig-cache/ dist/*.wasm
-	@rm -f bench_trainer bench_cl100k test_tokendagger
-	@rm -f *.a *.o *.wasm
+	@echo "$(YELLOW)🧹 Cleaning...$(RESET)"
+	@rm -rf $(BIN_DIR)/ zig-out/ zig-cache/ dist/*.wasm
 	@echo "$(GREEN)✅ Clean complete$(RESET)"

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ pub const Funcs = std.StaticStringMap(h.H).initComptime(.{
     .{ "version", h.c("\"3.12.0 (metal0 compiled)\"") },
     .{ "version_info", h.c(".{ .major = 3, .minor = 12, .micro = 0, .releaselevel = \"final\", .serial = 0 }") },
     .{ "executable", h.c("blk: { const _args = std.os.argv; if (_args.len > 0) break :blk std.mem.span(_args[0]); break :blk \"\"; }") },
-    .{ "stdin", h.c("std.io.getStdIn()") }, .{ "stdout", h.c("std.io.getStdOut()") }, .{ "stderr", h.c("std.io.getStdErr()") },
+    .{ "stdin", h.c("(try runtime.PyFile.create(__global_allocator, std.fs.File{ .handle = std.posix.STDIN_FILENO }, \"r\"))") }, .{ "stdout", h.c("(try runtime.PyFile.create(__global_allocator, std.fs.File{ .handle = std.posix.STDOUT_FILENO }, \"w\"))") }, .{ "stderr", h.c("(try runtime.PyFile.create(__global_allocator, std.fs.File{ .handle = std.posix.STDERR_FILENO }, \"w\"))") },
     .{ "maxsize", h.c("@as(i128, std.math.maxInt(i64))") },
     .{ "byteorder", h.c("blk: { const _native = @import(\"builtin\").cpu.arch.endian(); break :blk if (_native == .little) \"little\" else \"big\"; }") },
     .{ "getsizeof", h.wrap("@as(i64, @intCast(@sizeOf(@TypeOf(", "))))", "@as(i64, 0)") }, .{ "getrecursionlimit", h.I64(1000) }, .{ "setrecursionlimit", h.c("{}") },
